## wf

workflow manager

### Synopsis

wf manages my work-streams. With no subcommand it launches the
interactive TUI; subcommands operate on workflows from the shell.

```
wf [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --choosedir string   write selected workflow's dir to <path> on 'c' (used by fish wrapper)
  -h, --help               help for wf
```

### SEE ALSO

* [wf list](wf_list.md)	 - list workflows
* [wf new](wf_new.md)	 - create a new workflow

## wf help

Help about any command

### Synopsis

Help provides help for any command in the application.
Simply type wf help [path to command] for full details.

```
wf help [command] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for help
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
      --choosedir string   write selected workflow's dir to <path> on 'c' (used by fish wrapper)
```

### SEE ALSO

* [wf](wf.md)	 - workflow manager

